reviews.author: Tihomir Marjanac
reviews.text: One of the first interpollation busimess and shopping centres in Zagreb. Preferred by locals, and priced for affordable shops. However, neighbourhood is a bit ruined. Some.shops are closed. It has seen better days.

reviews.author: Stevo Rajevski
reviews.text: The shoppers experience in this place is terrible. The hallways are very tight and claustrophobic and people run into eachother. Most of the content is underground, the elevators are hard to find and there is only one escalator. The place generally facilitates not do popular brands but it has big selection of stores.

reviews.author: Moris Vdović
reviews.text: Mobility is changing. It is no longer just about movement. It’s about human experience. At XPENG, we see a huge opportunity for technology to transform the way people move. We reintroduce mobility as an experience, an extension of ourselves—thoughts and all. Whether it’s on the road, or in the air, smart, people-first mobility is our future.

reviews.author: The Porcelain Judge
reviews.text:
This restroom is clearly professionally made from a fellow enthusiast of cleanliness and convenience in restrooms, this review will mainly focus on the restroom on the 2nd floor, though both are of exemplary quality,
the restroom is clean and secluded, the number and separation of the urinals is good, and the toilets themselves are regularly cleaned, the mirror and lighting are to my utmost liking, there is even a full body mirror, the soap is good, and it offers both paper and air drying capabilities, the sink and tap are well spaced, though require changing the angle of your hands to wash sufficiently, also very spacious, an ideal restroom at the very least, congratulations on 5 stars

reviews.author: Mark Marku
reviews.text: The place is very nice and it will soon have Burger King and CineStar. The views are nice and the food court is luxurious and spacious. The only reason I am not giving it 5 stars is because there are no USB nor laptop chargers in the food court.

reviews.author: Ivan Milić
reviews.text:
This new shopping center is not that big as it was announced and advertised. The ground floor is significantly smaller than the first floor. It doesn't make a full circle like the first floor. On the first floor there are only 3-4 shops, all the others are still closed and in construction.
Maybe it will soon be complete, but in the meantime I'd rather visit the nearby City Center One.

reviews.author: m2token_2049
reviews.text:
It’s absolutely unreasonable that such a large shopping mall is open on Sunday, yet all the stores are closed. What’s the point of keeping the mall open — just so people can eat at McDonald’s? That makes no sense at all.

It’s really strange that in Croatia, on Sundays — when most people are off work and actually want to go shopping — only the food courts are open, and even those aren’t always operating.
It’s complete nonsense.
I do not recommend Croatian shopping malls at all

reviews.author: Ivan Milić
reviews.text:
The biggest shopping centre in this part of town. Usually not that busy as the other ones (City Center One).
The parking is always available, maybe because it's really big.
The mall is tidy and well-kept, with plenty of coffee bars (but no benches to sit on). The bathroom is modern and clean.

reviews.author: Tomislav Gašpert
reviews.text:
They have Interspar, TCOM,BonBon,Telemach and Tele 2 shops inside, as well as a Tisak Media where you can deposit and withdraw using your Aircash App! Most ATMs also inside as well as 2 bars.

Nice architecture and location,some shade. 4 benches only, in the sun,sadly.

reviews.author: Denis Sabedinovski
reviews.text: Large selection of shops, products in trend with world quality Good value for money. +385976699690 wwe.sabedinovski.com © 2021 Sabedinovski

reviews.author: Niko Draganić
reviews.text: The parking lot and the garage are not connected so if there is no space in the parking lot you have to drive around the block to get to the garage. Otherwise good variety of shops and never too crowded.

reviews.author: Mac
reviews.text:
There are 4 bathrooms (with doors), in the mens room, none of them work for years.

The real plants thruought the centre look cool though.

reviews.author: Ivan Milić
reviews.text:
Very clean and tidy. Some of the shops have recently closed because of the pandemic, unfortunately.
But the ones that are open, are usually very busy. The best place to eat is the restaurant Sofra on the upper floor.
The parking beneath is very big and there is always a free parking spot.

reviews.author: Vanja Matic
reviews.text: Fantastic shopping centre lots of choice from food shopping, cosmetics, clothes and home shopping. The terrace is great for socialising with friends and family. A couple of cafes and a restaurant too. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Rose
reviews.text: Great shopping center that offers a variety of different shops. There are beauty, shoe, clothes and food focused stores. The previous time I was here there was also a book stand. Point also offers a terrace, large underground parking with elevators and a playroom for kids. Throughout the mall are a lot of kid friendly devices and places for them to have fun at. Overall, Point Shopping Center is a clean, organised, kid friendly shopping center that has a lot of different stores to offer, as well as a bakery (Dubravica) nearby.

reviews.author: Dante Alexey
reviews.text: Offers a gym, playground, toy store, supermarket, and mobile store. Near a bank, trolley station, and the Jarun lake a bit farther away. It's a good resource for anyone living in Prečko.

reviews.author: Sandro
reviews.text: This place was good. Clean. Cool inside. Good stories and great restaurants. The best part is the gaming center.

reviews.author: Danny mills
reviews.text:
Outstanding, clean and easy to access. Excellent array of stores.
It is a real pleasure to go shopping in a centre that is totally devoid of Chinese crap.
I was last in this city some 30 years ago, simply incredible how it has changed and for the better I must say..
If I had known what was coming I would have moved here when I was young enough to make a new life...
I love it...

reviews.author: Omar Veledar
reviews.text: Easy turn off from the motorway if you are just passing by - a good place to have a break and pick up some necessities for the rest of your trip. There are plenty of parking spaces (despite the building works that were in a full swing when I visited). It seems that it gets tricky to get out (and return to the motorway) at the afternoon rush hour, but it seems to be manageable (with a minor delay). There are plenty of shops to chose from (for those that like to dwell on…).

reviews.author: Ivan Milić
reviews.text:
It's never too busy, the bathrooms are clean and tidy.
Deacthlon, Jysk, DM, Harvey Norman are located here. And a lot of others shops.
The parking in the front is huge and you can always find a free spot.

reviews.author: Sanel Mujic
reviews.text: King Cross Zagreb offers a great shopping experience, even while undergoing renovation. The current setup is still well-organized, with a good selection of stores and friendly service throughout. It’s clear that the improvements will make the space even better, and I’m looking forward to seeing the final result. A solid place to shop, and only getting better!

reviews.author: Merima Tafro
reviews.text: Some construction is still ongoing on the site, as its current capacity is being expanded. It does not have any disrupting effect on the existing vendors or their customers, but it does diminish the appeal somewhat.

reviews.author: Jan Lakatos
reviews.text: Great rest place when traveling through Zagreb. Inner playground for kids, grocery and drug store (Interspar, DM), and decent sandwiches and cakes right at the front of the mall.

reviews.author: Bo Holiday Invest
reviews.text: Nice place. Large parking lot.Good cafe on the ground floor.

reviews.author: The Traveller
reviews.text: Good and big shopping centar out side of Zagreb hear you can finde food, clothes end home tools

reviews.author: M L
reviews.text: The mall is quite nice. Nice mikroposition, near highway....so if you're passing through Zagreb you can easily stop to shop. Building is a litle bit streched so you'll have 10 min walk from one side to another....or plan your parking spot up front.  All the shops are there..from groceries, wardrobes, baby stores, tehnics, home assessories, casino, low budget stores, etc. One 'top barbecue in town' restaurant and one kebab shop. intersting is that there are two outlet shops for wardrobe....so you'll find suits and shirts for fair  prices.

reviews.author: vedran stanic
reviews.text: One car exit out of the shopping center tied to a short traffic light. If you like sitting in car traffic for 20 minutes to leave after shopping this is the right place to shop at!

reviews.author: Krešo M.
reviews.text:
This is one of my favorite large shopping malls in Croatia!  It has very wide selection of great shops,  great food court section,  several great cafes, modern and usually neat toilets and very large parking!
And building itself is very interesting and modern!

reviews.author: RAPID OL
reviews.text: Layout suitable for roadside location, not complementing surrounding residential area meaninfully, but at least easy to park, open air. Shops are ok, cafe is cool meeting point for out of town trips.

reviews.author: Kris T
reviews.text: Very nice retail park. Different shops, place to eat and have coffee. Easy to park. Pick up of larger items is happening behind the stores and after that you need to go over the whole parking again in order to exit.

reviews.author: Sonja Avramovic
reviews.text: Its ok to spend some time there...I'm not impressed... it looks old... u can find popular stores like Zara,Mango,kiko,Douglas.... i think that Zagreb needs better shopping mall...

reviews.author: Luka T.
reviews.text:
This is not negative nor postive review.
I'm not sure why this part of shopping center exists, whole story behind this looks pointless from my perspective. There are few decent shops worth visiting, but nothing special about them.
Enjoyable experience for people who don't like crowded areas.

reviews.author: Tuğçe Kaya
reviews.text: You can park there every easily, close by Euro spin, Plodine to shop. You have McDonalds there for food.

reviews.author: Laura I
reviews.text: Nice and easy , good parking

reviews.author: igor martinovic
reviews.text: Nice place for shopping, not overcrowded

reviews.author: Jurica Maskovic
reviews.text: Top

reviews.author: The Tech Expert
reviews.text: Great place to shop with numerous stores. It's easy to find a parking spot on weekdays, but not on weekends. I like it how everything is modern, tidy and maintained, but some of the road signage is crooked and pavement markings obscured which is the reason for a 4 star review.

reviews.author: Ivan Milić
reviews.text:
An average sized mall (smaller than City Center or Avenue Mall) with lots of furniture stores. What's more important, and probably more visited, is the children gameroom on the 1st floor. They offer lots of activities, and also arcade machines. They open at 15:00. The other stores mostly open at 10:00.
The parking in the front is big and there are always available spaces.

reviews.author: Vedran Subic
reviews.text: Lego exhibition 2025.

reviews.author: Radoslav Dejanović
reviews.text: The whole first floor is dedicated to children, with stores and playgrounds (commercial, pay to play). The ground floor has some nice restaurants and cafes, a grocery shop and mostly furniture stores. The atmosphere inside is quite relaxing.

reviews.author: Danijel Cetina
reviews.text: Everything you need for home in one place.

reviews.author: Danica Maričić
reviews.text: Nice place for furniture shopping. 😊

reviews.author: Zlatko Kompasi
reviews.text: Beautifully decorated passage but few attractive features

reviews.author: Michael Grau
reviews.text: OK, it works 😉

reviews.author: MILES MATT
reviews.text: Great gym in the city centre. Day pass was 10 euros. Can get busy at times but it's quite big so usually not an issue.

reviews.author: Christopher Loo
reviews.text: Great gym. Has cardio, weights, plyos, bags, for the fitness enthusiast, athlete, and great for your workout. Friendly staff and great atmosphere. I got the 3 day pass during my stay here in Zagreb 🙏

reviews.author: BackpackingAndy
reviews.text:
This is a great gym. It’s located near the city center and they have everything you need for a workout. They have equipment for all types of workouts.

The staff are friendly and accommodating.

The day pass cost is 10€. If you buy 3 days, there is a discount of 5€. So 25€ for 3 days.

reviews.author: PeterClements
reviews.text: Whether you’re into aerobics, pilates, or just a solid gym session, this place has it all. The trainers are motivating and the space is always clean.

reviews.author: Bobi Koymanov
reviews.text: The gym is very good, well equipped, with a lot of space. I went there in the morning and it was not crowded. 10 euro is a bit high for me and that's my only concern!

reviews.author: George Vrett
reviews.text: The gym is located on Nova Ves street, very close to the centre. It is a multi level space, equipped with Matrix machines (aura edition). There are also different areas where you can exercise with free weights and other equipment. A big plus is the fact that you can buy a scoop of protein after your exercise. The place is clean and not very crowded,. The price for one day is 15 euros

reviews.author: Kevin Kenbeek
reviews.text:
Lovely 'local' gym with an accessible vibe. Everything was clean and they made great use of the building's space.

The boxing area was a bit lacking as there was only 1 (quite heavy) heavy bag hanging at hip height in a hard floor room. Not ideal for a Muay Thai fighter looking to kick some stuff, but it did it's job.

Thanks for the great service and greetings from The Netherlands!

reviews.author: Andrej Barac
reviews.text: The best gym I found in Zagreb. Never too crowded and the only once I’ve seen with a Skiier. Professional staff, excellent machines and super clean. Everything you need in a gym. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Ксения Д.
reviews.text: great gym, our trainer Luca is super professional, comfortable changing room and halls, good simulators and sports inverter, although it needs some updating, there are problems with the air conditioning of the room, we really hope that the new owner will solve this issue, thank you to all the staff, see you again

reviews.author: Hilda Lopez
reviews.text: expensive for what you get. I do CrossFit and is not super well equiped. mainly one of each (if any) so, gets problematic when many are training at the same time. Plus the monthly packages are not adaptable, paying for everything is the only choice.

places.name: Gyms4you | Park Kneževa | Zagreb | Teretana | Fitness centar

reviews.author: Ahsan Agha
reviews.text: I believe the only gym chain in Croatia that is open 24X7. If you are coming to the gym for the first time make sure you are there between 9 AM - 7 PM or you will not be able to enter. The gym is very spacious and has all kinds of equipment you think of. Quite well maintained. Easy to access in terms of where it is located i.e. near the main train, bus station and very close to a tram station. Neat and clean. However this place doesn't have sauna which is not a bummer at all for me but maybe for those who are picky about it.

reviews.author: Jurica Maricic
reviews.text: Really wonderful 😊 Spacious new clean and well equipped 💪🏻

reviews.author: Andrej Barac
reviews.text: The gym is ok. A bit small considering it’s low budget so it gets busy very quickly. The equipment is new and very good but lacks some bits like having actual plates for a hex bar and deadlift so you can’t get the height you need to do it properly. Overall if you need something for a short period it’s fine as you have access to all of their gyms.

reviews.author: Warren Trout
reviews.text:
45€ credit card or cash for a single month with no commitment. Must sign up during normal staff hours. Gives you access to all their gyms. Lady at the front desk was very helpful and made the sign up process quick and easy.

Gym is fairly good, not great.  Dumbbells to 40, squat racks, reasonable Technogym machines. Weights are in the basement which does not go well for natural light.  Serious lifters probably need to look elsewhere but for most people this will work.

Bring a towel and gym shoes. You can't wear the same shoes you walked in on.

reviews.author: Michael Lord M Smith
reviews.text:
Staff Member was rude in Croatian and doesn't know that I understand Croatian perfectly even though I don't speak it. I asked to see their gym before deciding if I want to switch from my current gym (Dvorana.hr) to their gym - but the staff wasn't happy and was nagging to other customers in Croatian language obviously. He knew he was unprofessional, out of the line and decided to talk behind my back in his native language without knowing that I understand everything that he said.

Anyway he allowed me to see the gym and I must confirm that it lacks a lot of core machines for serious body builder like myself. I will remain with my current gym (Dvorana.hr) as they're the best gym in Zagreb with an Olympic standard machine and excellent customer service. Gyms4U is definitely for people that doesn't mind awful customer service, poor management, basic machines and rude staffs. Their staffs needs basic training in global standard of excellent customer service, because they lack it to the core.

reviews.author: Yi Liu
reviews.text:
Very spacious, lots of equipment, good sauna
Day pass 15€ slightly expensive

reviews.author: Frane Pešušić
reviews.text: Great, well equipped and modern gym. Excellent personnel, approachable, and friendly, Marta is as Great girl and person! No any crowd in gym at all, even that is,  there's plenty of Space for relaxed training.

reviews.author: marcoolinho
reviews.text: Only the best gym in the city, plain and simple. The guy who runs it is serious about it and so are the staff. Awesome equipment and locker rooms.

reviews.author: Mykola Sliepchenko (CyberDude)
reviews.text:
I’ve been training at this gym for a while now, and I must say it’s one of the best in terms of equipment and cleanliness. The variety of machines is impressive—everything is modern, well-maintained, and always in order. Dumbbells are neatly placed back where they belong, which makes workouts more efficient.

The locker rooms are spacious and clean, and the showers are not only large but also available in sufficient numbers, so there’s no need to wait. A nice bonus is the sauna, which adds to the overall experience.

If I had one small suggestion, it would be to add a few extra hooks or hangers in the locker rooms for convenience. Other than that, this gym is excellent!

reviews.author: Robert S
reviews.text: Great gym with awesome set of equipment and happy and focused little community - saw lots of smiles and people working hard. It’s 15e day pass. Just wish the sauna had been available it was broken or being cleaned :(

places.name: Gyms4you | VMD | Zagreb | Teretana | Fitness centar

reviews.author: Selu G
reviews.text: It’s all good but I wish they had bumper plates  🥲

reviews.author: Tomislav Grudić
reviews.text: Great gym but you have to pick a good time to go for a workout because it can get pretty busy. The only thing that I miss is a pec fly machine, otherwise it has great equipement and is very big. I’ve been a member for 3 years and have no complaints and the price is great for students.

reviews.author: Henry Svilkovic
reviews.text: Bigger locker room would be great, same goes for cabinets. Everything else is decent.

reviews.author: Tiho Devic
reviews.text:
Nice gym. Working hours advertised as 24/7.
Day one nobody there to open my membership.
Day two, I had no identification (osobna iskazbica).  Not sure why this is needed for international visitors?!
Day three, brought passports however minor (17 yo) needed parent to sign his membership. Got some paper to sigh (on croatian only).  No digital version?!  Clearly tourists are not welcome.
Advertised price is not for drop-ins.

reviews.author: Floppy Simulation
reviews.text: If you make a membership you cannot cancel it without coming back and they block you with a contract. Greedy behaviour and unacceptable

places.name: Gyms4you | Kvaternik Plaza | Grupni treninzi | Teretana | Zagreb

reviews.author: Lara Stagljar
reviews.text: This is the best gym in Zagreb, in my opinion. I’ve been almost everywhere because I used to have a Multisport Card. After I got my membership here (which is significantly cheaper) I didn’t feel the need to go anywhere else. The gym is huge, always clean, and even when it’s full you’ll find space. They also have the most wide selection of group classes I’ve come across in Zagreb. For the price this is just incomparable to other gyms in the city. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Nixon
reviews.text: One of the best Gyms4You in Zagreb. The working hours of the reception are the longest, the gym itself is well equiped and it's very close to the city centre.

reviews.author: Karlo Širić
reviews.text: The gym is amazing , is a lot bigger compared to other gyms4you gyms that I've been to , the equipment is all brand new and amazing . People at the reception are especially kind and helpful , particularly Lovre. Great gym definitely recommend it!!

reviews.author: Julian Seibel
reviews.text: Employers are not serious. On Friday, June 21, I wanted to train, come to the reception, because it was my first training in this gym, and then I wait approxiamately 15 minutes, but nobody come. Fortunately, a guy who waited with me a few minutes, explained to me that this happens often and he recommended me the The Fitness Branimir in Branimir Mall. I went there and it was much better. Thanks for the recommendation. If you are looking for a gym in Zagreb, I highly recommend The Fitness Branimir.

reviews.author: Tajana Pavlak
reviews.text:
I went to the gym for one-time workout as I was on vacation in Zagreb. I was robbed, someone stole all my money and my pants from my gym bag that I left in the locker in locker-room. They do not provide the key for the lockers, people need to bring their own if they want to lock their belongings.
At the counter they could not help me and they do not have a phone number to call, only email. I asked for the money back that I paid for this one workout (14€) and they refused and quoted their rule that the "members need to buy their own key". I have no idea what this has to do with me as I am not a member and did not sign anything. I was also told that I could have bought a key at the vending machine at the gym. I paid 14€ for one workout and I was also supossed to pay for the key?!
I guess it was my fault that I assumed that the things are safe as there is no option to lock them. They have a fingerprint system on the front door but can not put locks on their lockers?!
I went to many different gyms, bigger and smaller, and did not see this anywhere so far. I do not recommend gyms4you to anyone.

reviews.author: Zoran Pajić
reviews.text: Ultragym has a great, laid-back vibe with awesome music and a friendly atmosphere. The coaches are upbeat, professional, and really know their stuff. They work with everyone — from casual gym-goers to athletes — and also offer top-notch rehabilitation support. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Deana Kotiga
reviews.text: Amazing gym! Me and my partner stayed in Zagreb for a week and wanted to find a gym to train in - this was amazing: 8€ for the day, but we took a week pass for 15€. Big space, nice crowd, super helpful staff, nice and clean showers, and keys to the lockers provided. You have to bring your own towels if you want to shower, and also you’ll need a change of trainers (into clean ones which you’ll use in the gym). Would 100% recommend and will be back!

reviews.author: Amy Singh
reviews.text: Wonderful gym. It’s small but has a good amount of equipment including a few options for cardio machines. They offer a ton of classes. Day passes are €8. Clean changing rooms and free lockers for use while in the gym. It is also air conditioned.

reviews.author: cwall1314
reviews.text: Great place, if has everything you need and a great price compared to other gyms in Zagreb. Staff is very friendly. The gym is also very clean and organized and it's not too packed.

reviews.author: Sanja Đurin
reviews.text:
Great gym, and really friendly staff.
You will always feel welcome and sorrounded by old friends - so different from the majority of completely depersonalized gyms. Very well eqiped and airconditioned, lots of group programs.
